name: nepal-patro
description: A modern Nepali calendar, rates, panchang, and date converter app.

scripts.check:js: node --check app.js && node --check api/daily-data.js && node --check electron/main.cjs && node --check scripts/validate-data.cjs
scripts.check:all: npm run check:js && npm run check:data
